user.title: New Marktplaats search
user.description: Only the search term is required. Leave the postcode empty to use your Home Assistant home location.

data.name: Name (optional, defaults to the search term)
data.postcode: Postcode (optional, defaults to your HA home location)
data.notify_service: Notify service name (optional, e.g. "mobile_app_phone", found under Developer Tools > Actions) - sends a push notification with title, price, location and photo for each new listing. Must be a classic per-target notify service; the generic notification entity can't attach a photo.

reconfigure.title: Update Marktplaats search
reconfigure.description: Only the search term is required. Leave the postcode empty to use your Home Assistant home location.

data.name: Name (optional, defaults to the search term)
data.postcode: Postcode (optional, defaults to your HA home location)
data.notify_service: Notify service name (optional, e.g. "mobile_app_phone", found under Developer Tools > Actions) - sends a push notification with title, price, location and photo for each new listing. Must be a classic per-target notify service; the generic notification entity can't attach a photo.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Marktplaats, or this search returns an error.
error.postcode_resolution_failed: Could not derive a postcode from your Home Assistant home location. Please enter a postcode manually.

abort.already_configured: This exact search (term + location + filters) already exists.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: This change turns the search into a different search than the one this entry was originally created for. Add a new search instead.
